calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-23-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Neda Ataie (pwt@paulthomaslaw.com) for Petitioner.
Jason S. Takenouchi (JTakenouchi@kasowitz.com) for Respondent.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER RICHARD MCCOLLAM's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award:

Grant. No opposition filed.

order signed.

Counsel for petitioner is required to prepare a proposed judgment which recites all the terms of relief made in the arbitration award and must email them to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
